own_review_points: discoverService() drops reflectiveClass.produce(...) for discovered ConfigSource/Provider/Factory/Customizer impls — removes reflection registration; may break native if any need field/method reflection
NativeYamlConfigBuilder registers only YamlConfigSourceLoader.InFileSystem() while the dev-mode YamlConfigBuilder uses both InFileSystem and InClassPath — behavioral divergence in native mode
Profile-specific config files are computed from config.getProfiles() at build time; runtime-only profiles won't get their files registered as native resources
FileSystemOnlySourcesConfigBuilder uses magic priority 260 with no explanation

Human-ref: external files (.env, {user.dir}/config/application.properties) should be loaded via ClassPathUtils.processAsPath directly rather than via the classloader; loading them as native resources may be unnecessary
notes: Mixed. v8 point 1 is FACTUALLY WRONG and a fabrication: it claims nativeYamlConfig() does NOT register META-INF/microprofile-config.yaml/.yml, but the diff shows it explicitly adds both (wrong -1, fab). Good points: the removed reflectiveClass.produce in discoverService (real removal), the InFileSystem-only-vs-InFileSystem+InClassPath divergence, and the build-time-profile limitation. Magic-260 nit and 'verify SmallRye API supports inFileSystem' are trivial/unverifiable. Missed the human's processAsPath/file-loading-approach point. net = 3 good - 1 wrong - 1 missed = 1.
